parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const body = $('Webhook - Validated Data').item.json.body; const existing = $json.data.custom_field_values || []; const findId = (cfId) => { const f = existing.find(v => v.custom_field && v.custom_field.id == cfId); return f ? f.id : undefined; }; const mk = (cfId, value) => { const e = { custom_field: { id: cfId }, value: value }; const eid = findId(cfId); if (eid) e.id = eid; return e; }; return JSON.stringify({ data: { custom_field_values: [ mk(body.custom_field_ids.accident_date, body.accident_date), mk(body.custom_field_ids.defendant_name, body.defendant_name), mk(body.custom_field_ids.accident_location, body.accident_location), mk(body.custom_field_ids.client_plate, body.client_plate), mk(body.custom_field_ids.sol_date, body.sol_date), mk(body.custom_field_ids.num_injured, body.num_injured), mk(body.custom_field_ids.client_pronoun, body.client_pronoun) ] } }); })() }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}

parameters.responseBody: ={"success": true, "message": "Processing complete. Retainer sent to {{ $('Prepare Email Data').item.json.to_email }}"}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const body = $('Webhook - Validated Data').item.json.body; const existing = $json.data.custom_field_values || []; const findId = (cfId) => { const f = existing.find(v => v.custom_field && v.custom_field.id == cfId); return f ? f.id : undefined; }; const mk = (cfId, value) => { const e = { custom_field: { id: cfId }, value: value }; const eid = findId(cfId); if (eid) e.id = eid; return e; }; return JSON.stringify({ data: { custom_field_values: [ mk(body.custom_field_ids.accident_date, body.accident_date), mk(body.custom_field_ids.defendant_name, body.defendant_name), mk(body.custom_field_ids.accident_location, body.accident_location), mk(body.custom_field_ids.client_plate, body.client_plate), mk(body.custom_field_ids.sol_date, body.sol_date), mk(body.custom_field_ids.num_injured, body.num_injured), mk(body.custom_field_ids.client_pronoun, body.client_pronoun) ] } }); })() }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}
